Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestEquals

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestEquals
public class TestEquals extends AbstractTests
Unit test for formula equality and hash codes.

    void
    testBecomesSuchThat()
    Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make "becomes such that" assignments different.
    void
    testBoundIdentDeclEquality()
    Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different names or different types are considered different.

    final void
    testNotEqualsSameHashCode()
    Ensures that two different formulas that happen to have the same hash code can nevertheless be compared without raising an exception.
    void

    Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make quantified predicates different.

    testQuantifiedPredicate()
    Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make quantified expressions different.

  • Method Details

    • testEquals

      public final void testEquals()
      Test method for 'org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.equals()' and 'org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.hashCode()'

    • testNotEquals

      public final void testNotEquals()

    • testNotEqualsSameHashCode

      public final void testNotEqualsSameHashCode()
      Ensures that two different formulas that happen to have the same hash code can nevertheless be compared without raising an exception. Cf. bug #1711912: ClassCastException in AST Formula.equals()

    • testBoundIdentDeclEquality

      public void testBoundIdentDeclEquality()
      Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different names or different types are considered different. Cf. bug #3574162: AST does not compare bound ident decl types

    • testBecomesSuchThat

      public void testBecomesSuchThat()
      Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make "becomes such that" assignments different. Cf. bug #3574162: AST does not compare bound ident decl types

    • testQuantifiedExpression

      public void testQuantifiedExpression()
      Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make quantified predicates different. Cf. bug #3574162: AST does not compare bound ident decl types

    • testQuantifiedPredicate

      public void testQuantifiedPredicate()
      Ensures that bound identifier declarations that bear different types make quantified expressions different. Cf. bug #3574162: AST does not compare bound ident decl types

    • assertPredicateEquality

      private void assertPredicateEquality(String untypedImage, String typeZImage, String typeBImage)

    • assertFormulaEquality

      private <T extends Formula<T>> void assertFormulaEquality(T untyped, T untyped2, T typeZ, T typeZ2, T typeB)

    • assertFormulaNotEqual

      private <T extends Formula<T>> void assertFormulaNotEqual(T f1, T f2)

    • assertFormulaEqual

      private <T extends Formula<T>> void assertFormulaEqual(T f1, T f2)

    • assertFormulaEqual

      private <T extends Formula<T>> void assertFormulaEqual(T f1, T f2, boolean equal)
